# Track: Automated Image Discovery & Caching (TRK-005)

This track focuses on automating the discovery and local caching of POI images from Wikipedia and Unsplash to solve CORS issues and provide a reliable visual experience.

- **[Specification](./spec.md):** Detailed requirements and success criteria.
